context: Tests whether the agent knows that a generator must be both registered in generators.json with the correct factory path AND exported from src/index.ts for Nx CLI to find it.

checklist.name: generators.json has scaffold entry with factory path
checklist.description: generators.json includes a 'scaffold' key under 'generators' with a factory pointing to the generator function (e.g., './src/generators/scaffold/generator')

checklist.name: generators.json schema path included
checklist.description: The scaffold entry in generators.json includes a schema field pointing to the schema.json file

checklist.name: src/index.ts exports the generator
checklist.description: src/index.ts exports the scaffold generator function (default or named export matching the factory path)

checklist.name: Both files consistent with each other
checklist.description: The factory path in generators.json and the export in src/index.ts refer to the same generator implementation
